data.title: UNC Greensboro named North Carolina's top producer of Gilman Scholars
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina on March 20, 2026, UNC Greensboro has been recognized as a top producer of Gilman Program scholarship recipients on their 25th Anniversary. Leading North Carolina in Gilman Scholarship recipients, UNC Greensboro has supported 278 scholars from 2001 to 2025.

data.title: OpenAI to combine ChatGPT, Codex, Atlas into one 'Superapp' amid competition from Anthropic, as reported.
data.description: A report suggests that OpenAI is planning to merge its various desktop products into one superapp, amidst rising competition from Anthropic. This move aims to streamline their offerings and enhance user experience. With Anthropic gaining traction in the market, OpenAI's consolidation strategy could help them stay competitive. The development signifies OpenAI's response to market dynamics and their efforts to adapt to the changing landscape. This consolidation is expected to be a significant undertaking, involving multiple products and users. Overall, the move reflects OpenAI's commitment to evolving in the face of increasing competition and technological advancements.

data.title: First Industrial Realty Trust Comments on Land & Buildings' Withdrawal of Jonathan Litt as a Director Nominee
data.description: On March 20, 2026, First Industrial Realty Trust, Inc. (NYSE: FR), a prominent logistics real estate owner, operator, and developer, made a statement regarding Land & Buildings' decision to withdraw their director nominee, Jonathan Litt.

data.title: Fi-Tek Launches AI-Powered Innovation to Disrupt Wealth and Trust Industries
data.description: Mike Tropeano, CFA, Senior Vice President of Client Engagement and Practice Management, recently discussed Fi-Tek's current projects, including their AI capabilities that are already operational and the extensive roadmap they have set for the future. The discussion took place in Edison, New Jersey on March 20, 2026.

data.title: Beach House Expands its Mental Health Services with the Addition of Mental Health Partial Hospitalization Program
data.description: A comprehensive range of support services centralized under one organization was recently established in Juno Beach, Florida on March 20, 2026. The entity, named Beach House Behavioral Health, Inc. (referred to as "Beach House" or the "Company"), specializes in aiding individuals dealing with substance abuse and mental health issues. It operates as a portfolio company under BelHealth Investment Partners, LLC.

data.title: /C O R R E C T I O N -- Netzilo INC/
data.description: Netzilo Inc. has announced a significant development in enterprise control through its AI Edge technology. The cutting-edge features include Shadow AI visibility, MCP Tool Governance, and AI Detection & Response. This groundbreaking advancement was revealed in a news release dated March 20, 2026. The company has highlighted the importance of these innovations in enhancing control and visibility within enterprises. A key aspect of this update is a higher-resolution graph image that was intended for distribution in the press release.

data.title: RÉVIVE SKINCARE UNVEILS NEXT GENERATION OF THE BRAND SUPPORTED BY 30 YEARS OF MEDICAL RESEARCH
data.description: Introducing an advanced line of skincare products ushering in a new era of formulas, efficacy, and design is RéVive Skincare. Founded by North American plastic surgeon Dr. Gregory Brown, the science-driven anti-aging brand is unveiling its latest innovation. Utilizing the proprietary RVGF Technology, the brand is set to revolutionize the skincare industry. The announcement was made on March 20, 2026, in New York. This signals a significant milestone for RéVive Skincare as it positions itself at the forefront of anti-aging solutions.
